display.name: Cherry Blossom Storm
display.author: prism
display.blurb: A swirling current of cherry blossom petals carried on a slow spring wind, sky gradient overhead, camera drifting through the storm at eye level.

annotation.technical_notes: A massive array of custom shapes maps cherry blossom textures via texture_sample, instanced as a dense particle system. The 3D camera perspective and wave-like displacement are modulated by the audio's bass and mid frequencies, creating an undulating floral landscape. A subtle reflection in the lower screen space is generated via composite shader feedback, blending previous frames with a low decay rate.
